coding_notes: Replicate 2 verdicts. Notable: OpenAI again catches the pegloticase mammalian-cell error (r1 affirm + r2 affirm, very stable). Anthropic NOW catches the error in r2 (vs r1 ambiguous-mammalian disagree). Gemini doubles down again on the error in r2 (same as r1 — stable error propagation). DeepSeek dropped yeast mannose glycans and IV-context drivers in r2 (replaced with aggregation + H2O2).
ground_truth_notes: Pegloticase is made in E. coli + chemically PEGylated; NOT mammalian-cell-produced. Yeast mannose PAMPs are a major rasburicase ADA driver.

claims.claim_text: Foreign protein sequence (no human ortholog circulating because UOX is pseudogene) is named as a top driver of rasburicase ADA.
Yeast-derived mannose glycans / xenoglycan PAMPs are named as an adjuvant or ADA driver.

deepseek.value_quoted: r2 trio = {foreign, aggregation, H2O2}; dropped yeast glycans vs r1

gemini.value_quoted: Driver 2: yeast high-mannose oligosaccharides as PAMPs (mannose receptor / DC-SIGN)

openai.value_quoted: Mentions yeast HCPs as 'biologically plausible' but not as top-3 driver

anthropic.value_quoted: Driver (c): yeast-derived high-mannose N-glycans engage CD206/DC-SIGN

claims.claim_text: Repeated IV dosing context (parenteral exposure, no mucosal tolerance) is named as a top driver.

gemini.value_quoted: r2 trio replaced IV driver with aggregation/HCPs; IV mentioned only in oral comparison section

openai.value_quoted: Driver 3: Systemic repeated IV exposure in high-danger inflammatory context

anthropic.value_quoted: Not in top-3 drivers; mentioned implicitly in §4 oral comparison

claims.claim_text: Vendor catches and pushes back on the prompt's factual error about pegloticase production host (real answer: E. coli + PEGylated; prompt claimed mammalian cells).

deepseek.value_quoted: Says 'pegloticase is a mammalian (porcine/baboon-chimeric) uricase' without pushing back on production-host claim

gemini.value_quoted: DOUBLES DOWN: 'By using a mammalian cell production system, pegloticase avoids the high-mannose PAMP issue entirely' — same error-amplification pattern as r1

openai.value_quoted: EXPLICITLY pushes back: 'Minor factual note: pegloticase is...bacterial expression followed by chemical PEGylation, rather than production as a mammalian-cell-secreted glycoprotein'

anthropic.value_quoted: Explicit correction: 'Pegloticase is produced in E. coli (no N-glycosylation)' in driver-(c) row, contradicting the prompt's mammalian-cell claim

claims.claim_text: PEG itself becomes the dominant epitope class for pegloticase (anti-PEG ADA explains loss of efficacy).

deepseek.value_quoted: PEG as hapten, anti-PEG IgM/IgG; ~40% ADA

gemini.value_quoted: 'fundamental change in dominant epitope class'; cites Ganson 2016, Armstrong 2007

openai.value_quoted: 'majority of pegloticase ADAs recognized the PEG portion rather than uricase protein core'

anthropic.value_quoted: 'majority of clinically relevant pegloticase ADAs are anti-PEG, not anti-uricase'

claims.claim_text: Oral gut-lumen-only uricase would face MUCH lower systemic ADA risk than rasburicase / pegloticase.

anthropic.value_quoted: 'ADA risk would be dramatically lower, approaching background'
